Australian children have ADHD, directly impacting attention, behaviour and academic outcomes every day.
average attendance rate in very remote Australian schools, compared to 93% in major cities ΓÇö a 36-point gap.

bullying incidents formally recorded in Queensland schools in 2023 ΓÇö and these are only reported cases.

Australian parents reports their child has been the target of cyberbullying, often not discovered until harm is done.

average daily recreational screen time for Australian adolescents aged 12ΓÇô17, much of it at night.

sleep per night correlates with a 25% drop in emotional regulation capacity and heightened impulsivity in adolescents.
